title: Infinion Genesis Modpack
description: A modpack that enhances the players gameplay giving a highly optimized modded minecraft experience.
body:
If you want a minecraft experience that allows you to do what you want to do, this modpack is for you. 

This modpack contains a variety of different mods to improve your Minecraft experience 
and allow you to do what you want to do. This modpack features Apotheosis, Create, Ars Noveau, VS2, Applied Energistics 2, CC, Powah, Ice and Fire, and more.

This modpack was inspired by All The Mods, but with less mods to improve load time and user intrest.
It also contains several optimization mods to improve the modded minecraft experience.
It's very easy to progress through, but there is so much more to do than vanilla Minecraft.



Please report any bugs or mod suggestions on the project issue tracker.

Note: Ice and Fire allows players to fly on dragons, but due to the difficulty of obtaining and rasing a dragon this shouldn't be to much of a problem.

Links for other mods:
